approval.note: Repository changes require diff-bound review and green CI before merge.

title: SW-007 — Complete education variants and offline output
goal: Extend Learning View into teacher, projection, assignment, student, presentation and offline variants without personal data.

acceptance.assertion: Declared view variants share source content while enforcing audience-specific visibility.
Assignment output has explicit instructions, resources and submission boundary.
An offline package works without Miro or network access.
Fixtures and validators reject personal data in classroom/public outputs.
